Column.name: Note
Column.value: An Application Component is "an encapsulation of application functionality aligned to implementation structure” (TOGAF 9.2) An application component "represents an encapsulation of application functionality aligned to implementation structure, which is modular and replaceable” (ArchiMate 3.1)

Column.name: Note
Column.value: This mobile app will be installed on truck drivers’ smart phones to allow the shipping managers and partners to track the location of the truck at any moment of time.

Column.name: Note
Column.value: This service provides information about the current location of the smart phone that will be carried by the truck drivers during shipment delivery

Column.name: Note
Column.value: This mobile app will be installed on truck drivers’ smart phones to allow the shipping managers and partners to track the location of the truck at any moment of time.

Column.name: Note
Column.value: This mobile app will be installed on truck drivers’ smart phones to allow the shipping managers and partners to track the location of the truck at any moment of time.

Column.name: Note
Column.value: ABC Trading Enterprise Application Services Catalog

Column.name: Note
Column.value: Context Diagram Vehicle Tracking Application Service

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Enable ABC Trading to sell goods online

Column.name: Note
Column.value: From motivation, strategy, business, application, and technology layers

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Absence of a customer relationship management system

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Apply Loyalty Points on Order Amount

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Append the Request to the Requests Queue

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Use Email Service to Send the Message

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Need to establish customers loyalty function

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Need to create and document the customer loyalty functions

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Building the platform for online sales

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Convert Bulk Wholesale Items into Retail

Column.name: Note
Column.value: From motivation, strategy, business, application, and technology layers

Column.name: Name
Column.value: The business function needs to be established

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Current business application does not support loyalty

Column.name: Name
Column.value: No previous staff experience with the subject

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Procure a loyalty application and all the required devices

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Kick Off Building the Retail Capability within ABC Trading

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Approved to Hire the Required Staff

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Approved to Procure the Required Technologies

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Integrate Loyalty Application with Cards Printer

Column.name: Notes
Column.value: This diagram documents the Application Component focused metamodel which describes what other elements can relate to and Application Component using what types of relationships.

Column.name: Notes
Column.value: This diagram shows the context of the Tracking App Application Component. It describes what the application component is, what does it provide, who will use it, what other applications will integrate with it, and what does it need to operate

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Ability to Perform Retail Sales Capability
